sql_array: CREATE TABLE string_similarity (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name1 VARCHAR(100), name2 VARCHAR(100), similarity DOUBLE);
INSERT INTO string_similarity (id, name1, name2, similarity) VALUES (1, 'MonetDB', 'Database'), jarowinkler('MonetDB', 'Database');
INSERT INTO string_similarity (id, name1, name2, similarity) VALUES (2, 'SQL', 'NoSQL'), jarowinkler('SQL', 'NoSQL');
UPDATE string_similarity SET similarity = jarowinkler(name1, name2) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, name1, name2, similarity FROM string_similarity WHERE similarity < 0.5;
